title: Cobble Gen Haters
description: Water and Lava go hand in hand. No more pesky cobble/stone generation.
body:
Ever wanted to stop the generation of Cobblestone/Stone when water is touching flowing lava?
Then this is the mod for you!

This mod basically stops lava from creating Cobblestone/Stone.

Requested by EmosewaGamer.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
